indicators.name: open floor area
indicators.rationale: The open floor space allows for stretching without obstructions.

indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring provides a stable surface for yoga mats.

indicators.name: seating arrangement
indicators.rationale: The seating arrangement is too close to the open floor area, potentially obstructing it.

reasoning_summary: The open floor area and hardwood flooring make this space suitable for yoga, but the seating arrangement could obstruct the open space if not moved.
